name: Tiqets (Booking Holdings) Museum Ticket Distribution API
what_it_does: Tiqets (a Booking Holdings company) museum and attraction ticket distribution REST API for travel platforms, OTAs, and cultural institutions to access and resell 10,000+ museum, attraction, and experience tickets across 5,000+ venues worldwide with instant e-ticket delivery, real-time availability, and mobile-ready QR codes for skip-the-line entry at major cultural institutions. Enables AI agents to manage museum ticket search for attraction discovery automation, handle timed-entry booking for skip-the-line reservation automation, access real-time availability for capacity slot automation, retrieve instant e-ticket delivery for mobile ticket automation, manage booking cancellation for museum ticket reversal automation, handle venue catalog for destination attraction automation, access affiliate link generation for cultural travel monetization automation, retrieve multilingual content for localized museum automation, manage visitor count for group booking automation, and integrate Tiqets with travel platforms, hotels, and cultural institutions for end-to-end museum experience automation.
use_cases: Booking skip-the-line museum and attraction tickets for travel platform automation agents
Delivering instant QR code tickets for hotel concierge digital experience agents
Distributing museum inventory for OTA and travel booking platform automation agents
Generating affiliate museum ticket links for travel content monetization agents
not_for: Tours and guided experiences (Tiqets specializes in tickets, not guided tours)
Hotel or flight booking (Tiqets is attractions and museum tickets only)
Event tickets for concerts or sports (Tiqets focuses on museums and cultural attractions)
best_when: A travel OTA, hotel, or cultural institution wanting AI agents to book and distribute museum and attraction tickets with instant QR code delivery from Tiqets' Booking Holdings-backed inventory of 10,000+ venues.
avoid_when: TIMED-ENTRY TICKETS REQUIRE EXACT SLOT: Tiqets timed-entry museum tickets (Rijksmuseum, MoMA, Sagrada Familia) require specific time slot selection; automated general admission assumption for timed-entry venues creates rejected ticket at entry; automated must present time slot selection for timed attractions. E-TICKET DELIVERY IS CRITICAL PATH: Tiqets instant e-ticket (QR code) must reach customer before visit; automated delivery without confirmation creates unused booking; automated must verify e-ticket delivery and provide fallback. RESELLER PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: Tiqets partner API for reselling requires Booking Holdings/Tiqets commercial agreement; automated standalone access without partnership creates affiliate-only deeplinks not bookings. VENUE CAPACITY RULES VARY: Tiqets venues have venue-specific capacity and entry rules (max group size, age restrictions); automated group booking must check venue-specific rules; automated universal group admission creates entry denial at venue.

auth.notes: Tiqets uses API key for reseller partner authentication. REST API with JSON. Amsterdam, Netherlands HQ. Founded 2013. Acquired by Booking Holdings 2022. Booking Holdings subsidiary (NASDAQ: BKNG). Products: Museum tickets, attraction entry, timed-entry, skip-the-line, group tickets. SDKs: None public. GDPR. 10,000+ venues in 50+ countries. Mobile-first e-ticket delivery. Competes with GetYourGuide and Viator for cultural attraction ticketing with Booking Holdings distribution advantage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Reseller program required; sandbox via partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Reseller margin negotiated; typically 10-15% margin on face value tickets
pricing.notes: Amsterdam NL. Booking Holdings subsidiary (NASDAQ:BKNG). Reseller margin model. GDPR. EU-based.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; search and booking APIs throttled; webhooks for booking events

known_agent_gotchas: TIME SLOT SELECTION REQUIRED FOR TIMED-ENTRY: Tiqets timed-entry venues (Sagrada Familia, Rijksmuseum) require specific time slot; automated general-admission booking for timed venues creates INVALID_TIMESLOT rejection at venue
E-TICKET QR CODE DELIVERY IS CRITICAL: Tiqets books generate QR code e-ticket for venue scanner; automated booking without confirming customer QR code delivery creates stranded visitor at venue

RESELLER MARGIN REQUIRES PARTNER PROGRAM: Tiqets reseller API requires Booking Holdings/Tiqets commercial agreement; automated self-service API key assumption creates affiliate-deeplink-only access not reseller booking capability

VENUE-SPECIFIC GROUP SIZE LIMITS: Tiqets venues have maximum group size per booking; automated large group booking without size check creates EXCEEDS_GROUP_LIMIT rejection; automated group booking must check per-venue limits

CANCELLATION WINDOW VARIES BY VENUE: Tiqets cancellation policies are venue-specific (free cancellation 24h, 48h, non-refundable on day of visit); automated uniform refund assumption creates non-refundable rejection for strict-policy venues
agent_readiness.security_notes: Museum ticketing. Booking Holdings subsidiary. GDPR, PSD2. API key. EU/US. Booking and visitor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Museum ticketing OTA. Booking Holdings. GDPR, PSD2. API key. EU/US. Booking and visitor data.
